questions.text: In NEO, an inspection lot is automatically generated when a Good Receipt for any material is performed, regardless of its origin.
options: False - it's specifically for materials from Co-packers when it is defined in master data module

questions.text: What are the two parameters within SAP that determine the overall quality status of a stock?
